caption:
Clips from a documentary I am working on for @1903creativ 
Coming soon

I’ve said some of these things out loud…embarrassingly.

Then I realized most people never leave their home country. Most never see the ocean. Most never get to go on a plane. And very few are lucky to have great parents with a solid education.

Travel hasn’t just shown me the world’s beauty.

It’s shown me how incredibly fortunate I’ve been, and how there are so many people out there who dream of doing the things others take for granted everyday.

My purpose to make this world a better place grows on every trip thanks to these people I met along the way who gave me a life lesson.

I love traveling and making memories, but the best souvenir I’ve taken home is a slap in the face of reality.

Morning views in Switzerland. 🇨🇭
@hoehen_flug 

📍 Switzerland

#exploretocreate #switzerland #wengen #lauterbrunnen

Tu as déjà utilisé un stabilisateur? 👇🏽
Aujourd’hui, je suis super fier de pouvoir enfin te partager ce dernier projet tourné à ma cascade préférée! 
On me demande souvent si j’utilise un stabilisateur pour mes plans en mouvement. Ces derniers temps, je les tourne tous avec le fameux DJI RS5⚡️
Au-delà d’une stabilisation ultra poussée, une des nouveautés de cette pépite qui m’a le plus impressionné c’est sans aucun doute la sélection du sujet grâce au module et à l’écran tactile 😮‍💨
Analysé via la caméra du DJI, le stabilisateur suit ton sujet en mouvement. Un humain, un véhicule, un animal… plus aucune raison qu’il sorte du cadre!

tell my mom I’m sorry but I’m not coming back, staying here in the mountains ⛰️🦅

For a while now I have been focusing on trying new, weird, vintage style lenses. Out of everything I’ve tested, these 3 are by far my favorite. The look, the texture and the highlight roll off is unmatched, and I just keep going back to these.

What’s your favorite lens to shoot with?

#cinematography #filmmaking #lenses #cinematic

Yes but are you really a photographer if you don’t post a yes but carousel 😂 The top is the edit and the bottom is the raw photo, swipe across to see a little breakdown of what I did for each photo and also the last slide is definitely the best! #travel #photography

Underexposing this shot in Hong Kong to try and retain the details in the sky! It’s a blessing we have access to much better noise reduction tools these days.

Although the edit looks dramatic I often fix my white balance so that my Timelapse’s don’t random have color shifts. What that means is the raw images don’t exactly look like what I see in real life which means some extra editing needs to happen to bring that out!

This photo is actually a panorama/stitch of over 8 photos all together and the bottom one is just a fraction of the final image. 

The epic view in Hong Kong speaks for itself, only some small touch ups needed! Please don’t tell me the raw looks better haha

The icy zao snow monsters, needed to add some contrast and cool the image down to convey how freezing it actually was.

Still underexposing to try and save the detail in the beautiful NYC sky line!

The first camera I ever purchased was a @samsungau s7 edge, yup it was actually just a phone. I used it to make YouTube videos which everyone mocked me for but it was my first step into taking photos and videos. It was all I could afford at the time but years and years went by where I kept practicing, kept posting and I could never have imagined that now I am fortunate to take photos and video for a living, let alone  even have a pro camera and a bunch of lenses! If you are new here I’ve got many epic adventures to come so make sure you stick around!

The great pyramid of Giza 🇪🇬
Growing up I was always fascinated by Egypt, the Pyramids and Egyptian mythology. So coming to Cairo, I had high expectations. Still got completely blown away by this place. The energy is unlike anything I have ever felt before. So we decided to go on a spontaneous sunrise mission to shoot this place a second time. Thanks to my talented friend @michaelespiro for these shots 
.
.
📸: @michaelespiro 
🎨: Escape LUT Pack (Comment “LUT”) #egypt #cairo #pyramids

POV: You’ve just found the most insane all-inclusive resort in Europe… 🇹🇷✨

Welcome to Regnum The Crown, Antalya. @regnumthecrown 

All-inclusive has officially been redefined:

• 🍽️ 20+ world-class restaurants serving cuisines from around the globe

• 🛏️ Ultra-luxury suites and villas with breathtaking Mediterranean views, private pools, and butler service

• 🌊 Private beach clubs, stunning pools, an adults-only rooftop infinity pool, and incredible family spaces

• 🎭 World-class entertainment with live performances, international DJs, concerts, and spectacular evening shows

• 🥂 Premium food, top-shelf drinks, luxury experiences, and endless activities—all included

This brand-new resort has taken luxury to another level. From incredible dining and next-level service to state-of-the-art facilities, it’s designed for couples, families, and anyone looking for an unforgettable escape 🇹🇷 🌊 

From sunrise on the Mediterranean to unforgettable nights under the stars, every detail has been created to redefine what an all-inclusive holiday should feel like.

Would you stay here? 👀
